1package main
 2
 3func main() {
 4	println(4)
 5	println(5)
 6	println(6)
 7	println(7)
 8	println(8)
 9	println(9)
10	println(10)
11	println(11)

21	println(21)

25	println(25)
26	println(26)

28	println(28)

30	println(30)

32	println(32)
